head.name: Arreat's Face
head.flavor: "The peak of Mount Arreat watches over its sons."

chest.name: Stormrage Vestments
chest.flavor: "Woven from clouds and lightning. The sky itself obeys whoever wears it."

mainhand.name: Voidreaper
mainhand.flavor: "It doesn't cut through flesh. It cuts through existence."

offhand.name: Herald of Zakarum
offhand.flavor: "The golden shield of the Order, passed from one champion to the next."

boots.name: Deathcharger's Reins
boots.flavor: "The skeletal horse that carried them. The rider is gone. The speed remains."

belt.name: Gut-Ripper
belt.flavor: "Gnolls call this "the ender of meals". Rogues call it "Tuesday's tool"."

none.name: Azure Large Charm of of the Viper

boots.name: Gore Rider
boots.flavor: "Walk through the blood of your enemies without losing your footing."

ring1.name: Staff of Eternal Winter
ring1.flavor: "From the Icecrown Citadel's deepest vault. Time itself freezes at its touch."

amulet.name: The Unstoppable Force
amulet.flavor: "It has never stopped. It never will. Gods have tried."

gloves.name: Corruption's Embrace
gloves.flavor: "It wears you more than you wear it. The whispers grow louder over time."

weapon.name: Niruko's Leg
weapon.flavor: "There was something about a portal in the Dark Wood..."

chest.name: Stonebark Vestment
chest.flavor: "The bark hardened over a thousand years. It does not bend. It does not break."

head.name: Atiesh, Greatstaff of the Guardian
head.flavor: "The staff of Medivh, the last guardian. Arcane power radiates from it."

ring2.name: Benediction
ring2.flavor: "Blessed by Tirion himself. Carries the prayers of a thousand souls."

mainhand.name: Shadowmourne
mainhand.flavor: "The whispers of a thousand consumed souls guide each strike."

offhand.name: Corrupted Ashbringer
offhand.flavor: "Even corrupted, the blade still yearns to cleanse the darkness."

inventory.name: Nagelring
inventory.flavor: "May your pockets always overflow with gold and trinkets."

inventory.name: Frost Rune Fragment
inventory.flavor: "A chip of Icecrown itself. Still cold after ten thousand years."

inventory.name: Stormbringer Token
inventory.flavor: "Charged by the same lightning that shaped us all in the beginning."

inventory.name: Storm Heart
inventory.flavor: "A spark of the windseeker's soul, crystallized in amber."

inventory.name: Dragon Scale Fragment
inventory.flavor: "A single scale from Deathwing himself. Still warm."

inventory.name: Frost Rune Fragment
inventory.flavor: "A chip of Icecrown itself. Still cold after ten thousand years."

inventory.name: Call of the Ancients
inventory.flavor: "Three ancient keepers answer its call. Their names are lost to time."

inventory.name: Soul Shard
inventory.flavor: "A fragment of one of the thousand souls consumed. It hungers."

inventory.name: Holy Relic of the Silver Hand
inventory.flavor: "A symbol of the Silver Hand order. It protects those who protect others."

inventory.name: Arcane Crystal
inventory.flavor: "Pure crystallized mana. It hums with contained wrath."

inventory.name: Ancient Ward
inventory.flavor: "Warding runes inscribed by the last Earthen guardian."

inventory.name: Sunfire Quiver
inventory.flavor: "Arrows that never run dry. Each one burns with sunwell light."

inventory.name: Primal Stone
inventory.flavor: "A fragment of the World Pillar. The oldest material on Azeroth."

inventory.name: Iron Will Token
inventory.flavor: "Forged by Uther Lightbringer for warriors who refuse to fall."

inventory.name: Shadow Wisp
inventory.flavor: "The last echo of a night elf hunter, bound to serve forever."
